description_long: This object is a classic assault rifle with a distinctive design reminiscent of the AK-47. It features a wooden fixed stock and handguard, both finished in a reddish-brown color, contrasting with the matte black metal receiver, barrel, and magazine. The rifle has a curved detachable box magazine, a prominent front sight post, and a slotted gas tube cover above the barrel. The trigger and pistol grip are clearly defined, and the overall silhouette is robust and utilitarian. The muzzle end is fitted with a simple slant compensator, and the iron sights are integrated into the top of the receiver and barrel. The combination of wood and metal materials gives it a rugged, reliable appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A classic assault rifle with a wooden stock and handguard, black metal receiver, and curved magazine. Features iron sights and a slant compensator at the muzzle.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the narrow profile of the barrel, front sight, and a hint of the wooden handguard.
description_view_1: The left side view displays the full length of the rifle, highlighting the wooden stock, handguard, curved magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_2: The rifle is viewed from the rear, showing the slim outline of the stock and barrel, with minimal detail visible.
description_view_3: The right side view reveals the wooden stock, handguard, curved magazine, and the details of the receiver and iron sights.
